hero_subtitle: SFTY provides a unified compliance control layer that preserves audit-ready escalation records to strengthen risk visibility and support leadership oversight of high-risk digital asset cases.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Leadership struggles to maintain a consistent and auditable history across high-risk case escalations. This creates gaps in compliance oversight and weakens the ability to defend critical risk decisions during reviews or due diligence.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY structures high-risk case workflows to record every escalation step, decision and reviewer action, linking them to comprehensive audit evidence for clear, defensible compliance oversight and executive visibility.
workflow_title: From case creation to audit evidence
workflow_description: SFTY captures case details, tracks escalation actions and preserves all decision records to build a clear and defensible audit trail for compliance teams.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not just another layer. The evidence-ready control
why_sfty_description: SFTY gives executives a provider-neutral layer that preserves escalation records, links decisions to evidence, and strengthens audit readiness for high-risk compliance workflows.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY provides VASPs with a controlled compliance layer to preserve escalation records, strengthen audit trails and support defensible review for high-risk case oversight.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY preserve escalation records for high-risk cases
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how escalation workflows track compliance decisions
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence strengthens case defensibility
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Compare deployment options for secure executive oversight
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for executive risk control?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides executives a connected compliance control layer that enhances visibility, auditability, and risk management for digital asset compliance operations and high-risk case escalation.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY preserve escalation records?
faq_2_answer: SFTY records all case reviews, decisions, and actions with evidence-grade logs to preserve a clear, auditable escalation trail for high-risk compliance cases.
faq_3_question: How are compliance decisions and evidence logged?
faq_3_answer: Compliance decisions, reviewer actions and supporting evidence are logged in SFTY audit records for review and regulatory inspection readiness.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing provider tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects outputs from existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule, and screening providers into one structured and governed compliance workflow without needing replacement.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace compliance providers or tools?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY operates above existing providers to turn their outputs into structured compliance workflows, ruling out the need for replacing underlying tools or vendors.
final_title: Preserve high-risk escalation records with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY supports audit-ready decision logs and structured records that strengthen executive risk visibility and oversight.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
